title: I Release Body Comparison. I Allow My Own Pace.
subtitle: A release-and-allow energy statement for the body comparison that runs in the background
excerpt: A release-and-allow energy statement for when another woman's body has become the comparison point. The statement releases the comparison and allows the body to return to its own timeline. Used when the comparison is running on a loop.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education. The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca J Page, 2024). Day 11 of WEIGHT LOSS: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025) addresses body comparison specifically.

practice.whenToUse: Use when you have caught yourself measuring your body against another woman's and the comparison is sticky.

content.text: A release-and-allow energy statement for the body comparison loop. The comparison picks a reference point that is not your body and holds your body to that measure. The statement steps out of the comparison and back into your own timeline.
I am ready to release the comparison. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow my own body, at my own pace. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Original to homemade.education. The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca J Page, 2024).
